title: Manually structure + independently double-review 5 trials (gold standard)
context: The gold standard is the accuracy anchor for the whole project: 5 Ewing/pediatric-sarcoma trials manually structured and independently double-reviewed before any pipeline scale-up. It depends on the schema (001), guardrail policy (002), and verified License Register (003). Trials are drawn only from open registries; provenance is required on every assertion and ambiguous criteria are flagged, never guessed.
objective: Manually structure the eligibility criteria of 5 open-registry Ewing/pediatric-sarcoma trials into schema-valid records, independently annotated by two reviewers and adjudicated, to serve as the double-reviewed gold standard.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 trials structured independently by 2 annotators; Cohen's kappa >= 0.75; all disagreements adjudicated.
100% provenance on every assertion (trialId, registry, registryVersion, retrievedAt, verbatim sourceText, sourceTextSha256, reviewer, status).
Ambiguous or under-specified criteria are flagged human-must-resolve, not guessed.
No investigator/contact PII present; records validate against the eligibility schema.
Trials sourced only from open registries; verbatim source spans and SHA-256 hashes recorded.
